g.title: Mentor10KRichPipeline
g.text: Real A-share L3 orders + time-varying news to behavioral archetype field to latent video dynamics to interactive surrogate simulation

g.title: question
g.text: Can we replace expensive explicit 10k-agent market rollouts
with a learned generative surrogate that still supports rollout, intervention, and counterfactual analysis?

g.title: formulation
g.text: Treat market evolution as a spatiotemporal video of behavior fields,
not as explicit per-agent message passing or event-by-event simulation.

g.title: news_ctx
g.text: per stock, cumulative up to each window edge
no longer one static daily mean vector

g.title: cond_grid
g.text: weighted by stock activity inside each cell

g.title: raw_grid
g.text: each cell keeps up to 16 raw orders

g.title: encoder
g.text: raw order sequence to 64-d latent state
learned first on a smaller rich setup

g.title: order_loss
g.text: ties latent rollout back to raw order meaning

g.title: rollout
g.text: reuse generated tail as next condition

g.title: gap_execution
g.text: still not a full execution-level simulator

g.title: why_sim
g.text: Why this counts as interaction simulation

g.title: gap_identity
g.text: a cell is a behavior archetype,
not one traceable trader over time

g.title: outcome
g.text: We now have a working 10k-scale pipeline:
real market data to rich behavioral field to latent video dynamics to intervention-ready surrogate simulation.

g.title: gap_eval
g.text: intervention tests, and cross-day generalization remain
